texto: There is no rule on how to write. Sometimes it comes easily and perfectly
autor: sometimes it's like drilling rock and then blasting it out with charges.

Sometimes it comes easily and perfectly” articula reflexao, ernest-hemingway, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
